headline: Masco Corp (NYSE:MAS) Offers Strong Dividend Profile with Solid Fundamentals
summary: Masco Corp (NYSE:MAS) earns a 7/10 ChartMill Dividend Rating with a 1.88% yield, 18.19% dividend growth, and strong profitability. A balanced pick for reliable dividend income with solid financial health and reasonable valuation.
